input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.5.2
            TITLE: all team members who will give any part of the presentation, or who will respond to judges’

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.5.2: All team members who will give any part of the presentation, or who will respond to judges’
S.2.5.2 All team members who will give any part of the presentation, or who will respond to judges’ 
questions must be: 
• In the presentation area when the presentation starts  
• Introduced and identified to the judges.

final_answer: rule S.2.5.2: All team members who will give any part of the presentation, or who will respond to judges’ questions must be: • In the presentation area when the presentation starts • Introduced and identified to the judges.
